original.asymmetry: Dermoscopy of melanoma showing an asymmetric pigmented lesion
original.border_irregularity: Dermoscopy of melanoma showing irregular and jagged lesion borders
original.colour_variation: Dermoscopy of melanoma showing variegated pigmentation with multiple colours
original.diameter_large: Dermoscopy of melanoma showing a large pigmented lesion greater than six millimetres
original.atypical_pigment_network: Dermoscopy of melanoma showing an atypical pigment network
original.blue_white_veil: Dermoscopy of melanoma showing a blue-white veil
original.atypical_vascular_pattern: Dermoscopy of melanoma showing atypical vascular structures
original.irregular_streaks: Dermoscopy of melanoma showing irregular radial streaks and pseudopods
original.irregular_pigmentation: Dermoscopy of melanoma showing irregular pigmented blotches
original.irregular_dots_globules: Dermoscopy of melanoma showing irregular dots and globules
original.regression_structures: Dermoscopy of melanoma showing regression structures
original.symmetric_uniform: Dermoscopy of melanocytic nevus showing a symmetric uniformly pigmented lesion
original.reticular_network: Dermoscopy of melanocytic nevus showing a regular reticular pigment network
original.arborizing_vessels: Dermoscopy of basal cell carcinoma showing arborizing tree-like vessels
original.blue_grey_ovoid_nests: Dermoscopy of basal cell carcinoma showing blue-grey ovoid nests
original.ulceration: Dermoscopy of basal cell carcinoma showing surface ulceration
original.scaly_surface: Dermoscopy of actinic keratosis showing a scaly keratotic surface
original.strawberry_pattern: Dermoscopy of actinic keratosis showing a strawberry pattern with red pseudonetwork
original.milia_like_cysts: Dermoscopy of seborrhoeic keratosis showing milia-like cysts
original.comedo_like_openings: Dermoscopy of seborrhoeic keratosis showing comedo-like openings
original.cerebriform_surface: Dermoscopy of seborrhoeic keratosis showing a cerebriform brain-like surface
original.central_white_patch: Dermoscopy of dermatofibroma showing a central white scar-like patch
original.red_lacunae: Dermoscopy of vascular lesion showing red lacunae
original.healthy_skin: Dermoscopy of normal skin showing no visible lesion

descriptor_rewritten.asymmetry: Dermoscopy of melanoma showing a lesion lacking bilateral symmetry when bisected along any axis
descriptor_rewritten.border_irregularity: Dermoscopy of melanoma showing a border with notches, indentations, and angulated projections
descriptor_rewritten.colour_variation: Dermoscopy of melanoma showing three or more distinct colours including brown, black, red, and white regions
descriptor_rewritten.diameter_large: Dermoscopy of melanoma showing a lesion spanning more than six millimetres at its widest point
descriptor_rewritten.atypical_pigment_network: Dermoscopy of melanoma showing an atypical pigment network
descriptor_rewritten.blue_white_veil: Dermoscopy of melanoma showing a blue-white veil
descriptor_rewritten.atypical_vascular_pattern: Dermoscopy of melanoma showing polymorphous vessels including dotted, looped, and corkscrew-shaped blood vessels
descriptor_rewritten.irregular_streaks: Dermoscopy of melanoma showing radial projections and finger-like pseudopods extending from the lesion periphery
descriptor_rewritten.irregular_pigmentation: Dermoscopy of melanoma showing pigment distributed non-uniformly in discrete blotches across the lesion surface
descriptor_rewritten.irregular_dots_globules: Dermoscopy of melanoma showing dots and globules of varied size and spacing distributed unevenly across the lesion
descriptor_rewritten.regression_structures: Dermoscopy of melanoma showing white scar-like areas and blue-grey peppering replacing prior pigmented tissue
descriptor_rewritten.symmetric_uniform: Dermoscopy of melanocytic nevus showing a symmetric uniformly pigmented lesion
descriptor_rewritten.reticular_network: Dermoscopy of melanocytic nevus showing a regular reticular pigment network
descriptor_rewritten.arborizing_vessels: Dermoscopy of basal cell carcinoma showing arborizing tree-like vessels
descriptor_rewritten.blue_grey_ovoid_nests: Dermoscopy of basal cell carcinoma showing blue-grey ovoid nests
descriptor_rewritten.ulceration: Dermoscopy of basal cell carcinoma showing surface ulceration
descriptor_rewritten.scaly_surface: Dermoscopy of actinic keratosis showing a scaly keratotic surface
descriptor_rewritten.strawberry_pattern: Dermoscopy of actinic keratosis showing a strawberry pattern with red pseudonetwork
descriptor_rewritten.milia_like_cysts: Dermoscopy of seborrhoeic keratosis showing multiple white round structures resembling small keratin-filled cysts
descriptor_rewritten.comedo_like_openings: Dermoscopy of seborrhoeic keratosis showing round to oval keratin-filled crypts with dark central plugs
descriptor_rewritten.cerebriform_surface: Dermoscopy of seborrhoeic keratosis showing a cerebriform brain-like surface
descriptor_rewritten.central_white_patch: Dermoscopy of dermatofibroma showing a central white scar-like patch
descriptor_rewritten.red_lacunae: Dermoscopy of vascular lesion showing red lacunae
descriptor_rewritten.healthy_skin: Dermoscopy of normal skin showing no visible lesion
